text: To move
To settle in
To get used to
So far
Ever since
Recently
Lately
Homesick
To fit in
A while
To belong
Gradually
Settle in
Belong
I have lived in Florida for three months.
I have lived here since March.
She has worked at the clinic for two years.
We have known each other since we were kids.
Hi! You must be my new neighbor. Have you lived in this building for a long time?
Hi! Nice to meet you. Actually, I moved here quite recently. I have lived here for about three months.
Oh, welcome! And how do you like it so far? It takes a while to settle in.
So far, I love it. I am still getting used to the hot weather, but I have started to fit in.
That is great. I have lived here since 2015, and honestly, it still feels like home. Do you ever feel homesick?
Sometimes, especially for my family. But ever since I joined the local community, I have started to feel like I belong here.
I have felt at home ever since I arrived.
I am still getting used to the weather.
So far, I love my new life here.
How long have you lived here?

I moved to this city about five years ago, and honestly, it has been quite a journey. For the first few months, I felt a little homesick, and everything was new and confusing. But gradually, I got used to the rhythm of the place. I have lived in the same apartment since my second year here, and I really love it. I have worked at the same hospital for four years now, and I have made good friends ever since I joined a local running club. So far, this city has given me everything I hoped for. It took a while, but now I truly feel like I belong.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sofia! I just wanted to check in and see how you are settling in. I still remember when I moved abroad. For the first month, I felt so homesick, and I missed everything about home. But things get better, I promise. Ever since I found a daily routine, life has felt normal again. I have lived in three different countries so far, and each time it takes a while to adapt. Lately, I have been thinking about visiting you. How long have you been in Florida now? Is it three months already? Time flies! Call me back, and tell me everything. Bye!

I moved to Florida in the spring, and at first everything felt strange. For the first few weeks, I was a little homesick. Then, gradually, I started to settle in. Ever since I met my neighbors, I have felt more at home. So far, it has been the best decision of my life.
